title: Size Metric Validation — FWHM Units Bug Fix

bug_description.problem: JADES DR5 SIZE table FWHM column is in arcsec, but pipeline labeled it FWHM_pix and treated as pixels
bug_description.impact: Audit script multiplied by 0.03 (pixel scale) → all values 33× too small
bug_description.example: ID 402176: FWHM=0.3904" → was reported as 0.0117" (FWHM/PSF=0.081, false unresolved)

evidence.schema_confirmation: JADES DR5 SIZE table column 17: FWHM, format D (float64), unit: arcsec
evidence.value_range: 0.0132" to 1.6180" — consistent with arcsec, not pixels
evidence.psf_comparison: PSF F444W = 0.145" = 4.83 px at 30mas/px. If FWHM were in pixels, all sources would be sub-pixel (impossible for SExtractor).

maybe_reasons: 153323: F090W detected at SNR=4.4 (should be dropout at z=12.1)
433690: F090W detected at SNR=45.1 (should be dropout at z=12.5)
